title: T-023 — Wiring: lp.received + material.consumed handlers (FIFO consume + WAC update + cost variance compute) (§13.1, §11.4)
prompt:
# T-023 — lp.received / material.consumed worker handlers

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §13.1 event subscriptions rows lp.received + material.consumed; §10.1 cost_method_selector_v1; §11.4 V-FIN-INV-01..05; §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-01..04.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Apps/worker handlers subscribing to 05-WH outbox events:
1. `handle_lp_received(event)`: INSERT inventory_cost_layers row (FIFO) AND update item_wac_state (WAC) — both tracked parallel per PRD §13.1.
2. `handle_material_consumed(event)`: query evaluateCostMethodSelector (T-022); branch FIFO vs WAC; INSERT material_consumption_costs row; update work_order_costs.material_cost_actual.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/worker/src/finance/lp-received-handler.ts`:
   - Read event {org_id, lp_id, item_id, qty_kg, unit_cost, currency_id, receipt_date, source_type, source_ref_id, idempotency_key}.
   - Set `app.current_role='finance_worker'` + withOrgContext.
   - Transaction:
     a) INSERT inventory_cost_layers (qty_received_kg=qty_kg, qty_remaining_kg=qty_kg, ...).
     b) UPSERT item_wac_state: `total_value = old_total_value + (qty_kg * unit_cost); total_qty_kg = old_total_qty_kg + qty_kg`. avg_cost recomputed by GENERATED column.
     c) Insert tracking in processed_events.
2. `apps/worker/src/finance/material-consumed-handler.ts`:
   - Read event {org_id, wo_id, item_id, lp_id, qty_kg, currency_id, transaction_at, idempotency_key}.
   - Evaluate cost_method_selector_v1 via T-022 helper → method=fifo|wac.
   - If FIFO: consume layers in receipt_date ASC order using the partial index `idx_fifo_consume`. SELECT FOR UPDATE the next layer; deduct qty_remaining_kg; if exhausted, move to next layer until qty satisfied. For each consumed slice, INSERT material_consumption_costs row with unit_cost = layer.unit_cost + fifo_layer_id ref.
   - If WAC: read item_wac_state.avg_cost; INSERT material_consumption_costs with unit_cost = avg_cost; UPDATE item_wac_state: `total_value -= qty_kg * avg_cost; total_qty_kg -= qty_kg`. Reject if would go negative (V-FIN-INV-04).
   - Update work_order_costs.material_cost_actual += SUM(consumed slices) (atomic via SELECT FOR UPDATE on the wo_costs row).
   - V-FIN-VAR-03 check: if material variance > 15%, log warn + emit observability metric.
3. Worker registration: subscribe to `warehouse.lp.received` + `warehouse.material.consumed` events.

## Files
- apps/worker/src/finance/lp-received-handler.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/material-consumed-handler.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/registry.ts [modify]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/lp-received-handler.test.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/material-consumed-handler.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given lp.received event qty=100 unit_cost=2.5, when worker runs, then new layer (qty_received=100, qty_remaining=100, unit_cost=2.5) AND item_wac_state total_qty_kg +=100, total_value +=250. AND given event consumed twice, when second invocation runs, then no INSERT/UPDATE (idempotent).
- Given two events (50@1.0, 50@3.0) for same item, when both processed, then item_wac_state.avg_cost = 2.0.
- Given FIFO and consume qty=70 against layers (50@1.0, 50@3.0), when handler runs, then 50@1.0 fully + 20@3.0; layer 1 exhausted; layer 2 qty_remaining=30; 2 cons_cost rows; wo.material_cost_actual += 110. AND given WAC and consume qty=10 avg=2.0, when handler runs, then 1 cons_cost row unit_cost=2.0 total=20.0; item_wac_state totals updated.
- Given WAC consume would drive total_qty_kg < 0, when handler runs, then V-FIN-INV-04 raises and no UPDATE. AND given material variance recomputed > 15%, when handler completes, then warn log + audit 'material_variance_high'.
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: seed FIFO + WAC fixtures; assert each AC including partial consume across layers and idempotency.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/lp-received-handler finance/material-consumed-handler`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not consume layers out of receipt_date order (FIFO is mandatory per V-FIN-INV-02).
- Do not allow item_wac_state.total_qty_kg < 0.
- Do not bypass the FIFO partial index for performance.
- Do not use FLOAT for any cost / qty fields.
- Do not skip SELECT FOR UPDATE on layer rows (concurrent consume race).
- Do not emit downstream events synchronously — keep handler atomic transactional; downstream (12-REPORTING) consumes via finance_outbox_events appended at handler success.
- Do not handle this synchronously in a Server Action — async worker only.

pipeline_inputs.description: Two worker handlers: lp.received (insert FIFO layer + update WAC running avg in parallel) and material.consumed (FIFO consume in receipt_date order OR WAC consume with negative-inventory block).
pipeline_inputs.details: Implements §13.1 row 1 + row 2 verbatim. Both FIFO and WAC tracked in parallel — finance_settings.default_valuation_method only affects consume reads (display via T-025). SELECT FOR UPDATE prevents concurrent consume race. V-FIN-VAR-03 material variance warn at >15%. Idempotent via processed_events. [AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]

AND given event consumed twice, when second invocation runs, then no INSERT/UPDATE (idempotent).
Given two events (50@1.0, 50@3.0) for same item, when both processed, then item_wac_state.avg_cost = 2.0.
